name: Ear Plugs & Ear Muffs — Hearing Protection
shortDescription: Foam ear plugs and cup-style ear muffs for continuous high-noise work areas.
longDescription: Compressor rooms, DG sets, workshops and production floors running above safe continuous noise limits need hearing protection as standard PPE, not an afterthought. We stock both disposable foam ear plugs for high-turnover sites and adjustable cup-style ear muffs for staff working the same noisy station shift after shift — sized and rated so you can match protection level to the actual noise exposure on your site survey.

images.alt: Ear Plugs & Ear Muffs — Hearing Protection supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Typical use
specs.value: Compressor rooms, DG sets, workshops, production floors
